no: Hubelpot Thistletown, the Vegetable Merchant farmer passing for a druid? Sounds like a hoot. mod_installer: Silent install failure. Check mod version compatibility
sum: This mod adds the Vegetable Merchant Hubelpot Thistledown NPC to the game?
